login.title: Studio Renacer
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.networkError: Connection error. The server took too long to respond, please try again.
login.rateLimitError: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes and try again.

activate.title: Activate your account
activate.subtitle: Choose a password to access your space
activate.errorLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
activate.errorToken: The link is invalid or has expired
activate.rgpdIntro: Please read and accept the following document before continuing:
activate.rgpdCheckbox: I have read and accept the informed consent and privacy policy
activate.rgpdRequired: You must accept the informed consent to continue
activate.errorRgpd: Could not record acceptance. Please try again.

admin.attachGuide: Attach the private-area PDF guide to the welcome email
admin.noPatientsHint: Invite your first patient using the button above.

patientDetail.noPacksHint: Create a pack to manage this patient's payment and contract.
patientDetail.deletePatientConfirmDesc: All their data will be deleted: sessions, packs and acceptances. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
patientDetail.inactiveWarning: This patient is inactive and cannot access the platform.

patientDashboard.noPack: You don't have an active pack. Contact Andrea.
patientDashboard.contratoIntro: Here you can download the service contract and upload it once signed. If you already signed it on paper, there is nothing you need to do.
patientDashboard.gdprDesc: Download a copy of all your data (GDPR Art. 20).

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.overlapDesc: It overlaps with {{name}}'s session ({{time}}). Keep this time anyway?
calendar.cancelConfirmDesc: The session will be marked as cancelled at no charge.
calendar.cancelLateConfirmDesc: Cancellation under 24h: one session will be deducted from the patient's pack.
calendar.feedHint: Add this URL as a subscription calendar (in Google: Other calendars → + → From URL). It updates automatically. Don't share the URL: anyone with it can see your schedule.
calendar.regenerated: URL regenerated — re-subscribe with the new one
calendar.regenerateConfirmDesc: The previous URL will stop working and you'll need to re-add the calendar in Google/Apple.
calendar.externalHint: Connect your personal calendar's private iCal address (in Google: Calendar settings → Secret address in iCal format). Its events will show as "Busy" and block those hours.
calendar.externalDeleteConfirmDesc: Its events will no longer show as busy.
calendar.overlapMultiDesc: {{n}} of the dates clash with another appointment ({{fechas}}...). Create the series anyway?
calendar.requestedHint: The patient requested this appointment. Confirm or reject it — they'll be notified by email.
calendar.rejectConfirmDesc: The patient will be notified by email that the time is not available.
calendar.requestHint: Pick a day and we'll show you the free times. Andrea will confirm your appointment.
calendar.noSlots: No free times that day. Try another day.
calendar.slotTaken: That time was just taken. Pick another.
calendar.requestSent: Appointment requested — Andrea will confirm soon
calendar.joinCallPending: The video call link will arrive before the session
calendar.googleHint: Connect your Google account and every video call gets its own Meet link instantly, hands-free. Your Google Calendar only stores the date and time, never patient data.
calendar.googleDisconnectConfirmDesc: Links already generated will keep working, but new video calls will fall back to manual mode.
calendar.googleConnected: Google account connected — Meet links will be generated automatically
calendar.googleConnectError: Could not connect with Google. Please try again.
calendar.meetAutoHint: A Meet link will be generated automatically when the session is created.
